author: kunwar-vikrant
name: Adaptive TTT: Difficulty-Aware Epoch Allocation for Test-Time Training
technique_summary: Adaptive TTT on SOTA stack: dynamically allocates more SGD epochs to harder validation chunks and fewer to easy ones based on running mean NLL. Novel eval-only improvement requiring zero additional model parameters or artifact size.

attribution.base_stack: @bigbag SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK525 + Legal TTT (PR #1493)
